description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious wooden deck that wraps around the front and side of the building. The facade features large floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The interior is open-plan, with visible kitchen, dining, and living areas, and the exterior is finished in white with wood accents. Two lounge chairs are placed on the deck, suggesting a leisure-oriented design. A separate, irregularly shaped swimming pool with a stone border is positioned adjacent to the deck, enhancing the recreational appeal. The property is enclosed by a white railing, and the rear of the bungalow is more private, with minimal windows and a single door.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, expansive glass windows, a large wooden deck, and an adjacent swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full glass facade, wooden deck with lounge chairs, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the deck, the glass windows, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a single door, and the pool positioned behind the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, lounge chairs, and the pool to the side of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front windows
